title: carduus tenuiflorus subsp. pycnocephalus
intro: Carduus tenuiflorus subsp. pycnocephalus, also known as the narrow-leaved thistle, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carduus tenuiflorus subsp. pycnocephalus include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the flowers and leaves in hot water or a solvent, and are commonly used to treat various health conditions.
